metadata.description: Community-maintained MLB National League injury database

injuries.details: Tore right ACL before 2021 All-Star break. Surgery and missed rest of 2021 and most of 2022.

sources.title: Ronald Acuña Jr. right ACL tear

injuries.details: Tore left ACL in Pittsburgh game. Surgery and rehab through 2024-2025. Two surgically repaired knees.

sources.title: Ronald Acuña Jr. on knee injury recovery, 2025 expectations
Ronald Acuña Jr. updates recovery timeline for Atlanta Braves return
Ronald Acuña Jr. Expected To Miss First Month Of The Season

injuries.details: Not ready for Opening Day. First game back May 23 vs Padres — homered on first pitch after 362 days.

sources.title: Ronald Acuña Jr. finalizes return timeline

injuries.details: Late scratch from weightlifting. Hit leadoff HR next day. Cleared for All-Star Game.

sources.title: Ronald Acuña Jr. lower back discomfort update

injuries.details: Grade 1 strain vs Rockies at Coors Field. 10-day IL. Reinstated Aug 15.

sources.title: Ronald Acuña Jr. placed on IL with hamstring strain
Braves star Ronald Acuna Jr.'s injury may keep him out until after the All-Star break

injuries.details: Brief IL stint in late Aug after hamstring recovery.

sources.title: Ronald Acuña Jr. Achilles issue update

injuries.details: 7-game hitless stretch Sept. Moved from leadoff to 6th/7th by Snitker. Manager friction. Yankees trade interest reported.

injuries.details: Mystery stomach bug, no diagnosis after extensive testing. Lost ~20-25 lbs (175 to ~150) in two weeks. Missed Opening Day and Japan series.

sources.title: Mookie Betts battling undiagnosed illness
Mookie Betts injury update: Dodgers star has lost 18 pounds
Dodgers' Mookie Betts dealing with illness ahead of Opening Day

injuries.details: Diminished strength, reduced bat speed, mechanical swing flaws. Battled shortstop transition. Career-low .258 AVG, .732 OPS. Declared 'season over' early Aug.

sources.title: Mookie Betts returns from illness and struggles

injuries.details: Went through anger then sadness. Reframed mindset in August to accept failure and focus on small contributions.

sources.title: Mookie Betts battling undiagnosed illness

injuries.details: Strained right oblique, placed on 10-day IL. Manager Dave Roberts indicated 4-6 weeks for recovery. Betts went on rehab assignment with Triple-A Oklahoma City, making two rehab starts. Activated from IL ahead of a series and returned to the Dodgers lineup batting second vs the Giants. Missed approximately 32 games total.

sources.title: Mookie Betts returning from injured list
Dodgers Activate Mookie Betts
Dodgers GM Provides Latest Update on Mookie Betts Injury

injuries.details: Fractured the tip of the fourth left toe by bumping into a wall while trying to make his way to the bathroom in the dark during a road trip. Could not wear closed-toed shoes initially. Returned to the Dodgers lineup as the 2-hole and shortstop in the series against the New York Mets on June 3, 2025.

sources.title: Mookie Betts sustains toe injury
Mookie Betts Returns To Dodgers Lineup After Missing 4 Games With Fractured Toe

injuries.details: Bouts of lower back discomfort managed day-to-day throughout season. Removed in first inning of game vs Washington Nationals on Aug 4, 2025 due to lower back pain. Walked to first base and scored on Freeman's double, but was replaced by Miguel Rojas at shortstop.

sources.title: Mookie Betts injury update: Dodgers star leaves game with back issue

injuries.details: Career-worst regular season (.258 AVG) then .317 over final 47 games. 6 hits in Wild Card sweep vs Reds. Dodgers won 2025 World Series — Betts had clutch 2-run single Game 6 to force Game 7.

injuries.details: Sprained right ankle in final game of 2024 regular season. Played through pain in postseason including World Series. Missed 2 NCLS games.

sources.title: Freddie Freeman status for 2025 Opening Day
Latest Los Angeles Dodgers Provides Encouraging Update For 8x All-Star

injuries.details: Debridement + loose body removal. Ligaments healed enough to avoid reconstruction. 8 weeks post-procedure could hit for first time. Could not run until late Feb 2025.

sources.title: Freddie Freeman status for 2025 Opening Day
Freddie Freeman runs for first time since ankle surgery

injuries.details: Flared during spring training at Camelback Ranch. Sidelined for both Tokyo Series games as precaution.

sources.title: Mookie Betts turns the corner on illness (mentions Freeman rib discomfort)

injuries.details: Aggravated ankle slipping in shower at home. 10-day IL (April 3-11). Returned and felt best since injury.

sources.title: Latest Los Angeles Dodgers Provides Encouraging Update For 8x All-Star

injuries.details: Career-best .376/1.078 OPS pace through 30 games, then worst power slump (41-game HR drought May 11 - June 28). Batting avg fell from .374 to .297, OPS from 1.078 to .840 over 49 games. Daily 1.5-hr ankle treatment.

sources.title: Latest Los Angeles Dodgers Provides Encouraging Update For 8x All-Star

injuries.details: Late scratch vs Reds with stinger in neck/shoulder (recurred issue). Not considered serious; returned within 2 days.

sources.title: Freddie Freeman injury status

injuries.details: Hit .250 Wild Card, .200 NLDS. NLCS Game 1 walk-off HR. Walk-off HR in World Series Game 3 — second career WS walk-off (only player with multiple). Dodgers won 2025 WS. Season: .295/.367/.502, 147G, 24HR, 90RBI, 139 wRC+, 3.9 fWAR.
